name: keepseek-agent-protocol-maintainer
description: KeepSeek AgentRunner, protocol, tool-call, streaming, and context-compression maintenance workflows.

interface.longDescription: Use this plugin for changes in AgentRunner, model message construction, DeepSeek/OpenAI-compatible streaming, DSML fallback parsing, workspace tools, history projection, and context usage estimation.
defaultPrompt: Use $keepseek-agent-protocol-maintainer to change an AgentRunner flow.
Use $keepseek-agent-protocol-maintainer to review a tool-call bug.
